response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and deep systems expertise in event-driven and real-time architectures — but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing engineering teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, real-time systems (Dlang, microservices, streaming)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No public artifacts or descriptions of production multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops or observability
